name: team_task_claim
description: Claim a pending task from the team's task memory for execution. Use this to assign yourself to an available task. The task status will be updated to 'claimed' and assigned to the requesting agent. Team context is automatically inferred from the agent's team membership.

task_id.description: Specific task ID to claim. Use team_task_list to find available tasks. If not provided, will automatically select the best available task.

priority.description: Only claim tasks with these priority levels

required_capabilities.description: Only claim tasks that require these capabilities (agent must have them)

max_duration.description: Only claim tasks with estimated duration less than this (e.g., '1 hour', '30 minutes')

filter_criteria.description: Criteria to filter available tasks when not specifying a specific task_id

estimated_start_time.description: When the agent plans to start working on this task (ISO 8601 format)
